name: Millennia World School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Merpati Raya No.103, Sawah Lama, Ciputat, Tangerang Selatan, Banten, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Millennia World School is one of the few genuine alternatives to test-driven education in Greater Jakarta.
paragraphs: Parents say Millennia World School is one of the few genuine alternatives to test-driven education in Greater Jakarta.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$2.8K – US$5.2K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Ciputat campus, Arts studios, Music rooms, Outdoor learning spaces, Gardens.

quickFacts.label: Curriculum
quickFacts.value: Finnish Waldorf Framework, Indonesian National Curriculum
